name: Hesse (Germany)

colors.symbolism: from the historic colours of the Landgraviate of Hesse
from the historic colours of the Landgraviate of Hesse

description: Two equal horizontal stripes of red over white.
history: Adopted as the civil flag of the State of Hesse on 4 August 1948, restoring the historic Hessian colours; the Landgraves of Hesse used a red-and-silver striped lion as their arms from the 13th century.

features.symbolism: Red and white are the historic colours of the Landgraviate of Hesse, drawn from the medieval Hessian lion (a red and silver striped lion on blue).
